title: Yamaha Promotional Products
description: These are some of the marketing materials I created and helped to make for the Yamaha Watercraft division of Yamaha Motorsports. The main project I worked on was promotional and marketing material for the 2023 product launch at the Watercraft Product Preview.

title: Froggy Bottom Brewing Co.
description: A complete branding project for Froggy Bottom Brewing Co., a craft brewery concept. The project included logo design, label design for multiple beer varieties, packaging, billboard advertisement, and branded merchandise including t-shirts and baseball caps.

title: Paste Magazine
description: A publication design project featuring a redesigned issue of Paste Magazine with a cover story on Noah Kahan. The project includes the magazine cover design and interior spread layouts, demonstrating editorial design skills and typography.

title: Seltzer Poster & Can Design
description: A product design project featuring poster artwork and can designs for a seltzer brand. The project includes a Cherry Limeade poster design and multiple can variations, showcasing packaging design and promotional material creation.

title: Switzerland Travel Booklet
description: A travel guide booklet design for Switzerland, featuring cover design, accommodation listings, attractions, and transportation information. The project demonstrates layout design, information hierarchy, and editorial skills for print media.

title: Voix Branding
description: A branding project I completed for a site managed by LogixBuild Media. I was assigned the task of not only creating the logo presented here but also merchandise for going with it such as apparel, email hand-out signatures, and bluetooth headers.
